varieties.name: Alstonville
varieties.origin: Alstonville, NSW, Australia (Selected from wild stock, 1980s-1990s)
varieties.traits: Tall-growing shrub, narrow and floppy branches, dark green-black skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pale green flesh, long narrow fruit, almost seedless, mild acidity
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate to high, regular fruit set

varieties.name: Byron Sunrise
varieties.traits: Slow growing, low vigor, narrow canopy, dark maroon skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright orange-red vesicles (sunrise colored), mild lemon taste, low acidity
varieties.yield_notes: High despite small tree size, prolific producer

varieties.name: Red Champagne
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, well-developed dense canopy, reddish skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pink to red pearls, mild subtle taste with spiced apple, apricot and berry aromas
varieties.yield_notes: Very high, regular fruit set, long fruiting season

varieties.name: Pink Ice
varieties.traits: Medium height bush, ruby tinged brown skin, open canopy
varieties.flesh_fruit: Clear to pink rose colored pulp, large fruit size, low seed count

varieties.name: Judy's Everbearing
varieties.traits: Tall vigorous bush, well-developed canopy, green-brown to maroon fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Clear to red caviar (varies within same fruit), dark green skin, mild taste
varieties.yield_notes: Very high, fruits almost year-round (peak March-June)

varieties.name: Rainforest Pearl (Citrus australasica var. sanguinea)
varieties.origin: Bangalow, NSW, Australia (Judy Viola selection, first registered with Plant Breeders' Rights)
varieties.traits: Small open upright tree, crimson-tinged green fruit, vigorous grower
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pink to salmon flesh, long slender fruit, sweet and tangy mix with slight bitterness
varieties.yield_notes: Very high (6kg+ documented from single tree), regular fruit set

varieties.name: Jali Red
varieties.traits: Strong growing vigorous plant, long branches, open canopy, fruit varies black to red
varieties.flesh_fruit: Ruby red caviar, mild sweeter taste, almost seedless
varieties.yield_notes: Very high, late ripening, regular fruit set
varieties.growing_notes: Great potential for humid subtropical climates. Very decorative with multicolored fruit. Excellent subtropical climate tolerance. Heat and humidity resistant. Registered with ACRA.
varieties.availability: OZ Finger Lime VIC, Northern Rivers Finger Limes NSW

varieties.name: Durham's Emerald
varieties.traits: Medium open shrub, black fruit skin when ripe
varieties.flesh_fruit: Rich emerald green pulp, unique chemotype (limonene/citronellal/citronellol)
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate to high, regular fruit set
varieties.growing_notes: Good humid subtropical climates subtropical adaptation. Unique bright green caviar. Distinctive flavor profile. Registered with ACRA. Heat tolerant.
varieties.availability: Gondwana Native Limes, Citrus Men (Dwarf D'emerald)

varieties.name: Crimson Tide
varieties.traits: Slow growing, very thorny and bushy, lowest vigor of all varieties, small leaves
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep red caviar, long narrow fruit, almost seedless, sweet subtle lemon taste

varieties.name: Pink Pearl
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, open canopy
varieties.flesh_fruit: Darker pink caviar than Pink Ice, large fruit, mild with slight bitterness, grapefruit finish

varieties.name: Chartreuse
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, open canopy, small leaves, bright pink flowers, skin changes green to yellow/maroon when ripe
varieties.flesh_fruit: Large fruit, light green/yellow vesicles, subtle citrus flavor, less bitter than other varieties
varieties.yield_notes: High, extended flowering and fruiting season (March-June+)

varieties.name: Green Sapphire
varieties.traits: Attractive soft weeping habit, light green foliage, willowy appearance
varieties.flesh_fruit: Large plump green fruit (60-90mm), abundant green to clear pearls, effervescent tangy lime flavor
varieties.growing_notes: Excellent humid subtropical climates garden performer. Tolerates challenging subtropical conditions. Beautiful ornamental value. No-fuss habit. Can grow 1.6m in pots.
varieties.availability: Citrus Men, Perth Mobile Nursery, Plants Direct Tasmania, Pine Mountain Nursery

varieties.name: Emma
varieties.traits: Weeping variety, medium vigor, very dense lush canopy resembling 'weeping willow' look
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pink caviar, long skinny fruit, mild citrus flavor
varieties.yield_notes: High, regular and heavy fruit set

varieties.name: Flavourly Green (Tasty Green)
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, well-developed canopy, egg-shaped variety
varieties.flesh_fruit: One of largest fruit sizes, small clear acidic caviar, mild lemon taste with distinctive finger lime aroma
varieties.growing_notes: Grows well in humid subtropical climates pots or garden. Good subtropical climate tolerance. Large fruit size valuable for commercial use.

varieties.name: Green Giant
varieties.traits: Very vigorous tall tree, fairly light canopy, one of longest shaped fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Green skinny fruit, small size clear caviar, slightly acidic

varieties.name: Royal Pearl
varieties.traits: Orange skin when ripe
varieties.flesh_fruit: Yellow to gold pearls, unique coloration

varieties.name: Golden Nugget
varieties.traits: To be confirmed
varieties.flesh_fruit: Golden colored, details being evaluated
varieties.growing_notes: Extraordinary new cultivar from OZ Finger Lime promised for 2025. Expected good humid subtropical climates subtropical adaptation.

varieties.name: Little Beauty
varieties.traits: Dark green leaves, grows exceptionally tall
varieties.flesh_fruit: Details being confirmed
varieties.growing_notes: Currently available from OZ Finger Lime at special price $65 (3/4 L pot). Good for humid subtropical climates subtropical conditions.
varieties.availability: OZ Finger Lime VIC (Special $65), Finger Limes Melbourne

varieties.name: Rosa Ice
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, relatively light canopy density
varieties.flesh_fruit: Great quality uniform fruit, mild citrus taste
varieties.growing_notes: Suitable for humid subtropical climates. Late ripening extends harvest season. Good subtropical tolerance.

varieties.name: Sunshine Yellow
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, dense evenly shaped canopy, bright yellow fruit against dark green foliage
varieties.flesh_fruit: Yellow fruit, one of most attractive varieties visually
varieties.growing_notes: Sensitive to cold weather - best for Humid subtropical mild winters. Very ornamental. Beautiful contrast of yellow fruit on dark foliage.

varieties.name: New Yellow
varieties.traits: Long branches, dark green foliage, open canopy
varieties.flesh_fruit: Mild lemon taste, characteristic finger lime aroma, subtle flavor

varieties.name: Green Orb
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, well-developed canopy
varieties.flesh_fruit: Round fruit resembling traditional lime, green color, clear caviar, mild lemon taste
varieties.growing_notes: Unique round shape. Good humid subtropical climates subtropical adaptation. Characteristic finger lime aroma.

varieties.name: Blunobia Pink Crystal
varieties.traits: Compact medium bush, green-brown fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Deep pink flesh, pink crystal-like vesicles
varieties.growing_notes: Compact size perfect for humid subtropical climates small gardens and containers. Registered with ACRA. Good subtropical adaptation.

varieties.name: Collette
varieties.traits: Vigorous fast growing, open canopy, long strong branches, reaches 2m high
varieties.flesh_fruit: Black-brown skin (6-9cm long), bright green pulp when fully ripe, lemon skinned with large champagne colored flesh
varieties.yield_notes: High, optimal balance between acidity and sugars, very low seed count
varieties.growing_notes: One of chef's favorites. Excellent humid subtropical climates subtropical performance. Wide range of culinary uses on seafood and cocktails.
varieties.availability: Fruit Salad Trees, Gondwana Native Limes

varieties.name: D1 (Rainforest Jade)
varieties.traits: Green-yellow skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Green pulp, seedless selection, large fruit, almost seedless

varieties.name: Wild/Seedling Types
varieties.origin: SE Queensland and Northern NSW rainforests (Indigenous use for thousands of years)
varieties.traits: Highly variable - compact bush to medium tree, thin skin ranges green, yellow, red, purple to black
varieties.flesh_fruit: Cylindrical pearls filled with lime juice, color varies pink to white, highly variable genetics
varieties.yield_notes: Variable, takes 8-15 years to fruit from seed

varieties.name: Australian Blood Lime (Red Centre Lime)
varieties.origin: CSIRO Merbein, Victoria (Dr. Steve Sykes, selected 1990, PBR 1997)
varieties.traits: Cross: Rangpur lime (or Ellendale mandarin) × Red Finger Lime. Obloid tree shape, drooping branches, dense canopy, purple shoot tips, 2-2.5m height, spines 6-15mm
varieties.flesh_fruit: Blood-red rind, flesh and juice, burgundy-red elongated fruit, teardrop caviar develops pink/orange when ripening, flesh darkens to dark pink when fully ripe
varieties.growing_notes: CSIRO-bred hybrid suitable for humid subtropical climates subtropical climate. Ideal for dishes requiring lime juice. Striking red aromatic acid fruit. Compact growth perfect for containers. Rare and difficult to find. Grafted onto standard citrus rootstock.
varieties.availability: Gondwana Native Limes NSW (only licensed propagator in NSW), One Green World USA, Forest + Field, limited availability

varieties.name: Australian Sunrise
varieties.traits: Cross: Calamondin (mandarin × kumquat) × Finger Lime
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pear-shaped orange fruit, makes excellent marmalade
varieties.growing_notes: CSIRO-bred hybrid. Good for humid subtropical climates subtropical climate. Unique pear shape. Excellent for preserves.

varieties.name: General Grafted Finger Lime
varieties.origin: Australian varieties grafted, available in India (2020s introduction)
varieties.traits: Grafted on evergreen rootstock for tropical monsoon climates conditions, 1-2m height potential
varieties.flesh_fruit: Caviar-like lime pearls, variable colors (green/yellow/pink), minty citrus-forward aroma, tangy sweet slightly sour flavor
varieties.growing_notes: Adapts to tropical monsoon climates tropical monsoon climate (15-40°C ideal range). Requires well-drained soil with pH 5.5-6.5. Plant in full sun to partial shade with monsoon protection. Water regularly during dry periods. Tolerates Tropical monsoon warm humid conditions. Protect from strong monsoon winds. Can grow in containers. Fertilize: 20kg FYM, 100g urea, 1kg superphosphate per year for young plants.
varieties.availability: Greens of tropical monsoon climates (Kochi), Veliyath Gardens (Aluva, Ernakulam), Seed2Plant, tropical monsoon climates Nursery, Price: ₹600-1550

varieties.name: Caviar Lime - Layer Grown
varieties.origin: Australian species, layer propagated for tropical monsoon climates (2020s)
varieties.traits: Thorny understorey shrub/small tree, 2-7m in tropical monsoon climates climate, spines up to 25mm
varieties.flesh_fruit: Elongated finger-shaped fruit, filled with citrus pearls, bursts with tangy juice
varieties.yield_notes: Slower than grafted, but eventually productive
varieties.growing_notes: Adapts to tropical monsoon climates lowland tropical rainforest conditions similar to native habitat. Benefits: Boosted immunity, eye health, healthy teeth/gums, lowered blood pressure. Resistant to root diseases. Plant in 50% sunlight initially, then increase. Requires well-drained moist soil. Heavy monsoon tolerant once established.
varieties.availability: Greens of tropical monsoon climates (All India free shipping), tropical monsoon climates Nursery

varieties.name: Red Champagne
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, dense canopy, reddish skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pink to red pearls, mild taste, spiced apple/apricot/berry aromas
varieties.yield_notes: High, long season, can eat fresh, longest shelf life

varieties.name: Rainforest Pearl
varieties.traits: Small upright tree, vigorous grower, crimson-tinged fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pink to salmon flesh, sweet and tangy, long slender fruit

varieties.name: Judy's Everbearing
varieties.traits: Tall vigorous, well-developed canopy, green-brown to maroon fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Clear to red caviar (varies in same fruit), mild taste
varieties.growing_notes: EXCELLENT for tropical monsoon climates year-round tropical climate. Continuous fruiting suits Tropical monsoon lack of distinct seasons. Heat and humidity tolerant. Can eat fresh.
varieties.availability: May be available through specialized tropical monsoon climates importers

varieties.name: Pink Ice
varieties.traits: Medium bush, ruby tinged brown skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Clear to pink rose pulp, large fruit, low seeds

varieties.name: Alstonville
varieties.traits: Tall shrub, dark green-black skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pale green flesh, almost seedless, mild acidity
varieties.growing_notes: Can adapt to tropical monsoon climates tropical climate but sensitive to stress. Requires consistent care in monsoon conditions. Protect from strong monsoon winds.
varieties.availability: May be available through specialized nurseries

varieties.name: Byron Sunrise
varieties.traits: Slow growing, narrow canopy, dark maroon skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright orange-red vesicles, mild lemon taste

varieties.name: Chartreuse
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, open canopy, pink flowers
varieties.flesh_fruit: Light green/yellow vesicles, large fruit, less bitter, subtle flavor
varieties.growing_notes: GOOD for tropical monsoon climates tropical climate. Less acidic suits versatile tropical monsoon climates cuisine. Extended flowering suits year-round tropical conditions. Heat tolerant.
varieties.availability: May be available through specialized importers

varieties.name: Green Sapphire
varieties.traits: Weeping habit, light green foliage
varieties.flesh_fruit: Large plump green fruit, green to clear pearls, tangy flavor
varieties.growing_notes: SUITABLE for tropical monsoon climates. Tolerates challenging conditions. Can grow in containers 1.6m. Ornamental value for tropical monsoon climates gardens.

varieties.name: Seedling/Mixed Varieties
varieties.origin: Seedling-grown from Australian stock, available in India
varieties.traits: Variable growth habit, skin ranges green/yellow/red/purple/black
varieties.flesh_fruit: Variable pearl colors, cylindrical pearls with lime juice
